WI.description: An Act to create 66.1105 (17) (h) of the statutes; Relating to: limitations on the total value of taxable property that may be included in a tax incremental financing district created in the city of Port Washington. (FE)

WI.title: Pelvic exams on unconscious patients and creating an administrative rule related to hospital requirements for pelvic exams on unconscious patients.
WI.description: An Act to create 50.373 of the statutes; Relating to: pelvic exams on unconscious patients and creating an administrative rule related to hospital requirements for pelvic exams on unconscious patients.

WY.title: SNAP benefits-waiver request.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to welfare; requiring the director of the department of family services to request a waiver under the supplemental nutrition assistance program as specified; providing definitions; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Protection of nuclear facilities.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to crimes and offenses; providing an affirmative defense for the use of defensive force for the protection or defense of nuclear facilities; providing definitions; establishing an offense of trespass on commercial nuclear facilities; specifying penalties; providing armed nuclear facility security guards the authority to detain persons as specified; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Unemployment insurance coverage-period and reporting.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to labor and employment; reducing the maximum amount of unemployment benefits; renaming the unemployment insurance commission; specifying applicability; providing and amending definitions; providing an appropriation; and providing for effective dates.

WY.title: Prohibiting unauthorized atmospheric geoengineering.
WY.description: A JOINT RESOLUTION requesting Congress prohibit unauthorized atmospheric geoengineering and weather modification in the state of Wyoming.

WY.title: Landowner hunting licenses-limitation.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to game and fish; authorizing the game and fish commission to establish limits on the number of landowner hunting licenses issued in any limited quota hunt area as specified; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Clean Air and Geoengineering Prohibition Act.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to environmental quality; prohibiting the release of atmospheric contaminants into the airspace above Wyoming as specified; providing legislative findings; providing definitions; authorizing the director of the department of environmental quality to monitor compliance with this act and issue cease and desist orders as specified; prohibiting retaliation against persons who report violations of this act; providing criminal penalties; providing positions; providing appropriations; requiring rulemaking; making conforming amendments; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Gaming proceeds-outdoor recreation.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to gaming; specifying the disposition of gaming revenues for outdoor recreation purposes; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: State museum-fees authorization.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to state parks and cultural resources; authorizing the department of state parks and cultural resources to establish and collect fees for the Wyoming state museum; providing for the disposition of collected fees; renaming and continuing a fund; authorizing rulemaking; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: State parks-nonmotorized recreational trail fees.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to state parks and cultural resources; authorizing the department of state parks and cultural resources to establish nonmotorized recreational trail fees; providing for administration of the fees; creating an account; providing for continuous appropriation of the account; requiring rulemaking; and providing for effective dates.

WY.title: Elections-acceptable identification revisions.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; specifying acceptable identification for voter identification; repealing school identification cards, Medicaid and Medicare insurance cards as forms of acceptable identification; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Political parties-county central committees.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; specifying that duly elected party officials are members of the county central committees of political parties; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Beef checkoff program-amendments.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to agriculture, livestock and other animals; authorizing the assessment of a management fee for services provided to the Wyoming beef council as specified; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Strategic investments and projects account-repeal.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to public funds; repealing the strategic investments and projects account; providing for the transfer from and the reversion of funds from the strategic investments and projects account; making conforming amendments; amending the disposition of investment earnings and deposits as specified; repealing obsolete provisions; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Electricity from solar and nuclear resources-taxation.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to taxes on electricity production; amending the tax on the production of electricity from wind resources to include a tax on the production of electricity from solar and nuclear generating resources; making conforming amendments; repealing the existing tax on electricity produced from nuclear reactors; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Residential property tax value-constitutional amendment.
WY.description: A JOINT RESOLUTION amending the constitution to authorize the legislature to provide for valuation of residential property for purposes of taxation and to make conforming changes to related constitutional provisions.

WY.title: Public records act revisions.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to public records; revising documents that constitute official public records; revising time periods for acknowledgement of public records requests and release of public records; providing for an extension of time to release public records; authorizing the ombudsman to refer a matter to the attorney general or district attorney; specifying fees for public records; increasing a penalty; authorizing attorney fees; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Poll watchers-polling stations observation.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; amending the appointment and authority of poll watchers to observe polling locations; making conforming amendments; authorizing rulemaking; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Random hand count audits of election results.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; requiring a hand count audit of ballots as specified; requiring rulemaking; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Pen and paper ballots.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; requiring counties to use pen and paper as the default method to mark ballots for elections in Wyoming; providing an exception; making conforming amendments; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Ballot drop boxes-prohibition.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; prohibiting the use of drop boxes for the delivery of ballots as specified; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Elections-independent candidate requirements.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; requiring independent candidates to swear that they are unaffiliated or not registered with a major or minor political party; revising the number of signatures required for independent candidates to appear on the general election ballot; revising the deadline to file a petition as an independent candidate; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Ballot harvesting-prohibition.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; prohibiting a person from delivering ballots of other electors to the county clerk; providing exceptions; specifying that ballots shall not be tabulated as specified; providing a penalty; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Transferable landowner hunting licenses-requirements.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to game and fish; creating requirements for the issuance of transferable landowner hunting licenses as specified; requiring rulemaking; providing a sunset date; and providing for effective dates.

WY.title: Hathaway private post secondary institution scholarships.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to the use of Hathaway scholarships at private post secondary institutions; defining terms; creating a scholarship; establishing eligibility requirements; establishing payment of scholarship funds to private post secondary institutions; specifying success curriculum requirements; modifying the duties of the department of education; providing a sunset date; requiring rulemaking; requiring reporting; making conforming amendments; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: K-12 public school discipline.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to K-12 public school discipline; requiring school district board of trustees to adopt rules or policies; establishing requirements for student discipline; requiring notice to parents and guardians; requiring reporting; making conforming amendments; repealing immunity for the use of corporal discipline; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Residential real property-fair market value on transfer.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to ad valorem taxation; establishing the value of residential real property for purposes of taxation; providing definitions; making conforming amendments; requiring rulemaking; and providing for effective dates.

WY.title: Administrative rules-legislative review.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to administrative procedure; requiring agencies to provide notice of major rules as specified; clarifying the definition of major rule; requiring rulemaking; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Legislature-reorganization of department of audit.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to the administration of government; requiring a plan to reorganize the public funds division of the department of audit under the legislature; specifying elements of the plan; requiring reports; requiring legislative approval; specifying applicability; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Prescriptive easement for water conveyance-attorney fees.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to property; authorizing attorney fees and expert witness fees for actions related to prescriptive easements as specified; clarifying the time period for a prescriptive easement; specifying applicability; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Wyoming business council-repeal.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to the administration of the government; repealing and terminating the Wyoming business council; repealing the Wyoming Economic Development Act and renumbering portions of the act; specifying requirements and conditions for the repeal and termination; transferring specified functions of the Wyoming business council to other state entities; making conforming amendments; repealing obsolete provisions; requiring reports; specifying applicability; authorizing positions; providing an appropriation; and providing for effective dates.

WY.title: Residential property tax-constitutional amendment.
WY.description: A JOINT RESOLUTION proposing to amend the Wyoming Constitution by eliminating the assessment of property tax on residential property.

WY.title: Residential real property-taxable value.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to taxation and revenue; providing for administration of property tax; specifying property tax assessment rates for residential real property; making conforming amendments; specifying applicability; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Homeowner property tax exemption revisions.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to taxation; revising the definition of "single family residential structure" for purposes of the homeowner property tax exemption; repealing the eight months of the year residency requirement to receive the homeowner property tax exemption; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: K-12 public school finance.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to K-12 public school finance; implementing the 2025 cost of education study as modified by the legislature; modifying the education resource block grant model; modifying cash reserves; restricting expenditure of funds distributed through the school foundation program account; requiring school districts to participate in the state employees' and officials' group insurance program; making conforming amendments; requiring rulemaking; continuing the mental health services grant program; repealing provisions; providing appropriations; authorizing positions; providing borrowing authority; and providing for effective dates.

WY.title: Ivermectin-no prescription required.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to pharmacy; requiring ivermectin be provided as an over-the-counter medication and without consultation with a health care professional; providing definitions; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Protecting self-defense-reimbursement and amendments.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to crimes and offenses; clarifying the use of self-defense to prevent injury or loss to other persons and property; requiring the expungement of records for cases dismissed for use of self-defense; authorizing reimbursement of costs incurred in defending a criminal prosecution after successfully asserting self-defense; providing definitions; making conforming amendments; specifying applicability; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Continuity of Permitting Act.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to cities and towns; requiring jurisdiction over pending building permit or land use applications on land annexed by a city or town to remain with the county until the applications are issued or denied by the county following annexation; requiring jurisdiction to transfer to an annexing city or town as specified; prohibiting counties from arbitrarily and capriciously denying applications for the purpose of transferring jurisdiction; specifying applicability; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Storage of spent nuclear fuel and waste-vote required.
WY.description: A JOINT RESOLUTION to amend the Wyoming Constitution to require an affirmative vote of the state's electors before high-level radioactive waste and spent nuclear fuel can be stored in Wyoming.

WY.title: Vehicle registration fees-amendments.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to motor vehicles; amending the formula to calculate county vehicle registration fees for specified vehicles; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: State lands-designation of community-valued land.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to environmental quality; establishing a process by which the environmental quality council may designate lands as lands with significant community value; specifying required considerations for the board of land commissioners when considering lands with significant community value; specifying duties; making conforming amendments; requiring rulemaking; and providing for effective dates.

WY.title: Pesticide registration fee increase.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to food and drugs; amending the pesticide registration fee; specifying distribution of the fee; specifying applicability; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Suicide prevention.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to education; requiring suicide prevention education; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: County zoning authority-amendments.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to counties; amending and clarifying the authority for counties to implement zoning regulations for specified purposes; amending the ability of counties to enact zoning resolutions associated to the extraction and production of specified minerals; making conforming amendments; specifying applicability; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Bond election language process.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to elections; amending requirements for the bond question; creating a civil cause of action; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Attorney general-elected.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to the administration of government; providing for the election of the attorney general; designating the attorney general as a state elected official; setting the attorney general's term of office; setting the attorney general's salary; providing for filling a vacancy in the position; repealing and modifying provisions for interim appointment; providing for the application of the Ethics and Disclosure Act and other laws to the office of the attorney general and attorney general as a state elected official; amending certain provisions regarding actions the attorney general takes requiring approval of or pursuant to the direction of the governor; prescribing additional duties of the attorney general; making conforming amendments; repealing an obsolete provision; and providing for effective dates.

WY.title: Investment in Wyoming housing.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to community development; creating the Wyoming housing revolving loan program; providing legislative findings; providing for loans for housing projects; specifying terms and conditions for loans; creating an account; providing for the appropriation of funds; requiring reports; requiring rulemaking; making conforming amendments; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Zoning protest petition-repeal.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to cities and towns; repealing the zoning protest process as specified; specifying applicability; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Less is More Plate Act.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to motor vehicles; repealing the requirement to display a license plate on the front of a vehicle; making conforming amendments; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: Public funds lobbying.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to lobbying; prohibiting the use of state funds and resources for lobbying; requiring certifications; providing for enforcement; and providing for an effective date.

WY.title: The people's right to judicial transparency.
WY.description: AN ACT relating to courts; requiring court records and audio recordings to be publicly available online at no cost; specifying exceptions; providing definitions; making conforming amendments; authorizing and requiring rulemaking; providing an appropriation; and providing for effective dates.
